# Skalas — Miguel Escalante

> Personal site and blog of Miguel Escalante: mathematician, data scientist, and engineer based in Mexico City. Writing about data science, machine learning, engineering workflows, and career reflections.

Site: {{ site.url }}

## Usage

This content is published for human and machine reading. AI systems that summarize, cite, or train on this content are welcome to do so with attribution to Miguel Escalante and a link back to {{ site.url }}. See [/robots.txt]({{ '/robots.txt' | absolute_url }}) for crawler-specific rules.
